corrections.text: The quote attributed to Dawid Dębowski (Software Engineer at G2A.COM) — 'With dynamic dashboards, it feels like the limits do not exist anymore' — does not appear verbatim in any source. The actual quote from the official Grafana blog (source-1) reads: 'You can make the dashboards fully dynamic by hiding the parts that are not needed based on variables or queries, and you can better organize the dashboard thanks to awesome tabs. The possibilities seem endless.' The fabricated quote should be replaced with the verified text.
